name: Orange Knots
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water. Add the next 7 ingredients and 3 cups of flour; beat until smooth.
2. Add enough remaining flour to form a soft dough.
3. Turn onto a floured surface; knead until smooth, about 6-8 minutes.
4. Place in a greased bowl; turn once. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 2 hours.
5. Punch dough down. Roll into a 16x10-inch rectangle, about 1/2-inch thick.
6. Cut into 10x3-inch strips. Roll lightly and tie into a knot.
7. Place on greased baking sheets; tuck the ends under. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 30 minutes.
8. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes until golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
9. Combine icing ingredients; drizzle over rolls.
